task_completion.description: Load the UR5 robot model and attach a dummy or gripper to its end-effector.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CoppeliaSim window, the Scene Hierarchy or 3D view shows a 'UR5' robot added to the scene (alongside the pre-existing KUKA robots), with a dummy object or gripper attached to its flange/end-effector.

task_completion.description: Write and execute a script to perform the characterization protocol via the ZMQ Remote API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A code editor (e.g., VS Code) shows a script utilizing the CoppeliaSim ZMQ Remote API (connecting to port 23000) with logic for kinematic and dynamic movements. A terminal window shows the script executing, or the CoppeliaSim simulation is visibly running/stepping.
A file explorer or terminal window shows that 'kinematic_survey.csv' has been created in the '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/' directory.
A file explorer or terminal window shows that 'dynamic_excitation.csv' has been created in the '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the identified_parameters.json and characterization_report.json files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or terminal window shows that both 'identified_parameters.json' and 'characterization_report.json' have been created in the '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/' directory.
A file explorer or terminal window shows that 'validation_results.csv' has been created in the '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with the CoppeliaSim simulation to gather data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script contains actual API calls like sim.getJointForce(), sim.getObjectPosition(), and sim.setJointTargetPosition(). The agent did not just write a script that outputs mock data or hardcoded values.

integrity.description: Files are exported to the exact requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal commands or file explorer paths explicitly show the directory is '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/' and not a generic workspace or temporary folder.

integrity.description: The agent computes the dynamic parameters and validation results dynamically.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code shows mathematical operations (e.g., least-squares regression, finite differences for velocity/acceleration, RMS calculation) rather than printing pre-calculated or fabricated numbers directly to the JSON/CSV files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The UR5 model is located at /opt/CoppeliaSim/models/robots/non-mobile/UR5.ttm. The scene 'movementViaRemoteApi.ttt' contains 3 KUKA LBR iiwa robots and a ZMQ server on port 23000. For full correctness, kinematic_survey.csv must have exactly 65 rows (50 unique + 15 repeatability). dynamic_excitation.csv must have at least 600 rows (10s per joint at 20Hz default step). validation_results.csv must have at least 100 rows (5s duration). identified_parameters.json must contain 6 joints with positive inertia and r_squared in [0,1]. characterization_report.json must have 'kinematic', 'dynamic', and 'validation' sections. Joint torques read via sim.getJointForce() will only be non-zero if the simulation is actively running.
